vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-1709: bug(deacon): orphan-proposed reconciler ignores review pipeline state — attempts duplicate work-agent spawns on in-review issues

plan.title: bug(deacon): orphan-proposed reconciler ignores review pipeline state — attempts duplicate work-agent spawns on in-review issues
plan.author: agent:claude-fable-5

narratives.Problem: findOrphanProposedSpecsForReconciler (src/lib/cloister/orphan-proposed-reconciler.ts) treats any issue with a 'proposed' spec, no exact-match `agent-<issue>` tmux session, a non-running agent state, an open tracker issue, and beads==plan-items as an orphan needing a work agent. It never consults the review pipeline: no check of the review_status table (review/test/ship status, prNumber, readyForMerge), no check for live `agent-<issue>-review-*`/test/ship sessions, and no check for an open PR on feature/<issue>. An issue whose work agent legitimately stopped because work is done and in review looks identical to one never started, so the reconciler attempts duplicate work-agent spawns (live incident: spawned agent-pan-1658 onto PAN-1658 whose PR #1707 was closed as superseded, consuming the last agent-capacity slot). Only host-load guardrails blocked earlier duplicates.
narratives.Proposal: Three-layer pipeline-presence exclusion. (1) Candidate filter consults review_status via a new injectable getReviewStatusForIssue (default getReviewStatusSync) and excludes issues where an exported pure predicate hasReviewPipelinePresence() sees progress: reviewStatus !== 'pending', testStatus !== 'pending', mergeStatus set and !== 'pending', readyForMerge, or prNumber/prUrl recorded. Row existence alone does not exclude. (2) Candidate filter's tmux exclusion widens to any session matching `agent-<issue>` or starting with `agent-<issue>-` (trailing hyphen), covering live review convoy/test/ship sessions. (3) reconcileOrphanProposedSpecs gains an open-PR gate after the cooldown and before the spawn attempt, via injectable hasOpenPrForBranch defaulting to async `gh pr list --head feature/<issue> --state open` (execAsync, fail-open on gh errors). All new skip paths log console diagnostics only, never activity-feed entries (PAN-1626 discipline). This is defense-in-depth alongside sibling PAN-1708 and must work standalone.

autoDecisions.summary: Review-pipeline presence is decided by an exported pure predicate over the review_status row: reviewStatus !== 'pending', testStatus !== 'pending' (including 'skipped'), mergeStatus set and !== 'pending', readyForMerge === true, or prNumber/prUrl present. Row existence with all-pending fields does NOT exclude.
autoDecisions.rationale: Matches the issue's fix sketch (review/test/ship beyond pending, PR recorded, ready_for_merge). All-pending rows are created at spawn time for issues that may genuinely need reconciling; 'skipped' testStatus still proves the pipeline touched the issue.

autoDecisions.summary: The review_status read is injected via FindOrphanProposedOptions.getReviewStatusForIssue defaulting to getReviewStatusSync, mirroring the existing getAgentStateForIssue injection.
autoDecisions.rationale: Keeps unit tests hermetic (no SQLite fixture needed) and follows the module's established dependency-injection pattern.

autoDecisions.summary: The open-PR gh check runs in reconcileOrphanProposedSpecs after the per-issue cooldown, not in the per-scan candidate filter.
autoDecisions.rationale: The spawn is the dangerous action; gating there satisfies the acceptance criterion while the 5-minute cooldown caps gh CLI calls at ≤1 per issue per 5 minutes instead of every 60s patrol.

autoDecisions.summary: gh failures fail-open (proceed as if no open PR) with a console diagnostic.
autoDecisions.rationale: Fail-closed would permanently block legitimate reconciler spawns on non-GitHub projects or hosts without gh auth; the review_status check remains the primary guard.

autoDecisions.summary: No config flag for the new checks; they are unconditional. All requiresInspection flags set to false.
autoDecisions.rationale: Duplicate-spawn correctness guards should not be toggleable. The change is a contained bug fix: a wrong predicate surfaces immediately in the same-bead unit tests and end-of-PR review, not as silent foundation rot across beads.

items.title: Add hasReviewPipelinePresence() predicate with unit tests

narrative.Action: In src/lib/cloister/orphan-proposed-reconciler.ts, add an exported pure function hasReviewPipelinePresence(status) accepting a Pick of ReviewStatus (reviewStatus, testStatus, mergeStatus, readyForMerge, prNumber, prUrl) | null. Return true when reviewStatus !== 'pending', testStatus !== 'pending', mergeStatus is set and !== 'pending', readyForMerge === true, or prNumber/prUrl is present; false for null or an all-pending row. Add unit tests in src/lib/cloister/__tests__/orphan-proposed-reconciler.test.ts covering every branch.

subItems.title: Predicate returns false for null and for a row with reviewStatus 'pending', testStatus 'pending', no mergeStatus, readyForMerge false, no prNumber/prUrl

Predicate returns true for each progressed field in isolation: reviewStatus beyond pending, testStatus beyond pending (including 'skipped'), mergeStatus beyond pending, readyForMerge true, prNumber set, prUrl set — each covered by a unit test

items.title: Exclude candidates with review-pipeline presence in the candidate filter

narrative.Action: Add getReviewStatusForIssue?: (issueId: string) => <ReviewStatus pick> | null to FindOrphanProposedOptions, defaulting to getReviewStatusSync from src/lib/review-status.ts. In findOrphanProposedSpecsForReconciler, skip any spec whose review_status row satisfies hasReviewPipelinePresence(), logging a logReconcilerDiagnostic('candidate-excluded', { issueId, reason: 'review-pipeline-presence' }) console diagnostic (never an activity-feed entry). Add the issue-mandated unit test: spec status 'proposed', beads == plan items, no tmux session, agent state stopped (in-review-with-stopped-work-agent), review_status { reviewStatus: 'passed', prNumber } → no candidate and no spawn through reconcileOrphanProposedSpecs. Also test that an all-pending row still yields a candidate.

subItems.title: Unit test: issue with spec 'proposed', stopped work agent, and review_status reviewStatus 'passed' + prNumber produces no candidate and reconcileOrphanProposedSpecs attempts no spawn (the issue's required in-review-with-stopped-work-agent case)
Unit test: an issue with a review_status row whose fields are all pending/absent is still returned as a candidate (row existence alone does not exclude)

Default wiring uses getReviewStatusSync when no getReviewStatusForIssue option is supplied; exclusion emits only a console diagnostic, no emitActivityEntrySync call (PAN-1626 discipline asserted in test)

items.title: Widen tmux exclusion to live pipeline sessions (agent-<issue>-* prefix)

narrative.Action: In findOrphanProposedSpecsForReconciler, replace the exact tmuxSessionNames.includes(agentId) check with: exclude when any session equals agentId OR starts with `${agentId}-` (trailing hyphen). This covers live review convoy sessions (agent-<issue>-review-<subRole>, per review-monitor.ts), test, and ship sessions. Add unit tests for both the positive and the prefix-collision-negative case.

subItems.title: Unit test: a live session named agent-<issue>-review-security excludes the issue from candidates
Unit test: a session for a longer issue number (e.g. agent-pan-30011) does NOT exclude PAN-3001 — trailing-hyphen prefix match prevents issue-number collisions

items.title: Open-PR gate before spawn attempt in reconcileOrphanProposedSpecs

narrative.Action: Add hasOpenPrForBranch?: (projectPath: string, issueId: string) => Promise<boolean> to ReconcileOrphanProposedOptions. Default implementation runs `gh pr list --head feature/<issue-lowercase> --state open --json number --limit 1` with cwd=projectPath using promisified exec (execAsync — NEVER execSync; this code is reachable from the dashboard server). In reconcileOrphanProposedSpecs, after the cooldown gate and before the spawn attempt, call it: true → skip with logReconcilerDiagnostic('spawn-skipped', { reason: 'open-pr' }) and push a 'Skipped … open-pr' action, no spawn, no activity-feed entry; gh error → fail-open (log diagnostic, proceed). Set the cooldown timestamp on open-PR skips as on attempts so gh is called at most once per issue per cooldown window. Unit tests mock hasOpenPrForBranch — no real gh calls, no real timers.

subItems.title: Unit test: candidate with hasOpenPrForBranch resolving true is skipped — spawnWorkAgent is never called and no activity-feed entry is emitted
Unit test: hasOpenPrForBranch rejecting (gh failure) fails open — the spawn attempt proceeds
Default implementation uses promisified exec with cwd=projectPath and the feature/<issue-lowercase> head branch; no execSync anywhere in the change
